ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company belongs to */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the company is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the company */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the company */,
  "fax" TEXT /* Fax number of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bond_issuances" (
  "issuance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bond issuance */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company issuing the bond */,
  "bond_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bond type */,
  "issuance_date" TEXT /* Date the bond was issued */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the bond issuance in €m */,
  "coupon_rate" REAL /* Coupon rate of the bond */,
  "maturity_date" TEXT /* Date the bond matures */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency the bond is denominated in */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the bond */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bond */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issuance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bond_issuances_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bond_issuances_bond_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("bond_type_id") REFERENCES bond_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bond_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bond type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the bond type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bond type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bond_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "issuance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bond issuance */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date the price was recorded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the bond on the given date */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the price data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bond_prices_issuance_id FOREIGN KEY ("issuance_id") REFERENCES bond_issuances ("issuance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bond_yields" (
  "yield_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each yield record */,
  "issuance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bond issuance */,
  "yield_date" TEXT /* Date the yield was recorded */,
  "yield" REAL /* Yield of the bond on the given date */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the yield data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("yield_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bond_yields_issuance_id FOREIGN KEY ("issuance_id") REFERENCES bond_issuances ("issuance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, admin) */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the bond data */,
  "issuance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bond issuance being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the bond data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_issuance_id FOREIGN KEY ("issuance_id") REFERENCES bond_issuances ("issuance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data record */,
  "issuance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bond issuance */,
  "market_date" TEXT /* Date the market data was recorded */,
  "market_price" REAL /* Market price of the bond on the given date */,
  "market_yield" REAL /* Market yield of the bond on the given date */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_issuance_id FOREIGN KEY ("issuance_id") REFERENCES bond_issuances ("issuance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "issuance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bond issuance the article is related to */,
  "article_date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_issuance_id FOREIGN KEY ("issuance_id") REFERENCES bond_issuances ("issuance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bond_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "issuance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bond issuance */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bond_versions_issuance_id FOREIGN KEY ("issuance_id") REFERENCES bond_issuances ("issuance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bond_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "issuance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bond issuance */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was assigned */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the bond */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bond_ratings_issuance_id FOREIGN KEY ("issuance_id") REFERENCES bond_issuances ("issuance_id")
)
